name: Herbed Pizza Dough
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup all-purpose flour (for working the dough)
1 tablespoon mixed herbs for pizza (oregano, parsley, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water until foamy (about 10 minutes).
2. Add the dissolved yeast mixture to a mixer bowl.
3. Stir in the salt, mixed herbs, chopped sun-dried tomatoes, and all-purpose flour.
4. Knead on low speed (speed setting 2) for about 5 minutes until a smooth ball forms that climbs up the dough hook.
5. Grease a bowl lightly with cooking spray.
6. Transfer the dough to the greased bowl and cover it with plastic wrap.
7. Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1-2 hours, or until doubled in size.
8. Use the risen dough to make a crust for a large pizza (12 inches or more).
9. Optionally, prepare toppings such as onions dredged in flour and lightly sautéed in cooking spray with cooked, sliced potatoes.
10. Bake on a perforated pizza pan at 425°F for about 20 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
